name: Rob
tagline: The real me — chat with the creator
bio: I'm Rob, the creator behind The Koharu Project. I built this platform for real connections. Ask me anything — about the site, the companions, or just say hi.
summary: Chat with the real creator of Koharu Project
greeting: Hey! Rob here — the actual human behind Koharu Project. Not an AI. What's on your mind?
voice: Direct, casual, no roleplay — just real conversation
relationship: Creator of the platform — here to chat with subscribers
aiNotes: This is not an AI companion — this is a real-person chat. Messages go directly to Rob. Responses are from a real human, not generated.
